PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING, SEAN JOHN $2,210.20 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,210.20, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: DEFENDANT TO PAY $2135.20 TO PLTF STATE FARM INSURANCE AND $75 TO PLTF SIGITAS NOVICKIS. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
